chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1346 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Priority 1. For hearing on CMA No.6766/2025 2. For hearing of main case. 14-04-2025 M/s. Omer Soomro, Danish Nayyer and Abdul Haseeb Qazi, advocates for the petitioner Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Mr. Muhammad Raheem Qureshi/respondent No.5 Mr. Qamar-uz-Zaman Shah, Assistant Director Legal SPPRA The subject matter herein was escalated before the CRC and in apparent failure of CRC to decide within the prescribed time the matter has escalated into an appeal before the Review Committee. Syed Qamar-uz- Zaman Shah, Assistant Director Legal SPPRA has placed on record a notice issued by the Review Committee for hearing to be held tomorrow, 15th April, 2025. Since the statutory forum has taken notice, no further reason is apparent for perpetuating this petition. The parties remain at liberty to present their case before the Review Committee and challenge any resultant order, if so required. With the consent of all present, this petition is disposed of in the above terms. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
